title: Dynamo Graph File (.dyn / .dyf)
description: Schema for the Dynamo visual-programming graph file format (JSON, Dynamo 3.0+). Both .dyn (home workspace) and .dyf (custom node definition) files share this schema. Serialised by WorkspaceWriteConverter and WorkspaceViewWriteConverter.

Uuid.description: Unique identifier for the workspace. Uses standard hyphenated GUID format. For custom nodes this is the CustomNodeId; for home workspaces it is the workspace GUID.

IsCustomNode.description: True if this file is a custom node definition (.dyf), false for a regular graph (.dyn).

Category.description: Hierarchical category path for custom node definitions. Only present when IsCustomNode is true.

Name.description: Display name of the workspace, typically derived from the file name.

ElementResolver.description: Maps partial type names to fully qualified names and their containing assemblies.

Inputs.description: Nodes marked as graph inputs (for Dynamo Player / Customizer). Populated from nodes where IsSetAsInput=true and InputData is non-null.

Outputs.description: Nodes marked as graph outputs (for Dynamo Player). Populated from nodes where IsSetAsOutput=true and OutputData is non-null.

Nodes.description: All nodes in the graph. Each node is polymorphic based on the ConcreteType discriminator. Transient nodes are excluded.

Connectors.description: All wire connections between node ports.

Dependencies.description: GUIDs of custom node definitions used in this graph (distinct FunctionIds from Function nodes).

NodeLibraryDependencies.description: Package, file, and external dependencies required by nodes in this graph.

EnableLegacyPolyCurveBehavior.description: Legacy PolyCurve behavior flag. Only present in home workspace (.dyn) files.

Thumbnail.description: Base64-encoded thumbnail image of the graph, or empty string. Only present in home workspace (.dyn) files.

GraphDocumentationURL.description: URI linking to external documentation for this graph. Only present in home workspace (.dyn) files.

ExtensionWorkspaceData.description: Data stored by Dynamo extensions/plugins. Only present in home workspace (.dyn) files.

Bindings.description: Execution trace data (callsite bindings) for nodes that participate in trace. Used for element binding (e.g. Dynamo for Revit). Only present when an engine was available at save time.

View.description: UI/view layer data added by the WPF ViewModel during save. Contains canvas position, zoom, node positions, annotations, notes, camera, and Dynamo version info.

GuidNFormat.description: A GUID in N format (32 hex characters, no hyphens).

ElementResolver.description: Resolves partial class names to fully qualified names and assembly paths.

ResolutionMap.description: Map from short name to {Key, Value} pair where Key is the fully qualified name and Value is the assembly/DLL name.

NodeInputData.description: Metadata for a node designated as a graph input (for Dynamo Player/Customizer). Source: NodeInputData.cs

Type.description: Input type (legacy, limited to backward-compatible values). Obsolete in favor of Type2.

Type2.description: Input type (preferred). Superset of Type values, includes newer selection types. Note: 'selection' is obsolete; use 'hostSelection' or 'dropdownSelection' instead.

Value.description: The value of the input when the graph was saved. Always a string regardless of input type.

Choices.description: Available choices for dropdown selection inputs. Omitted when null.

MaximumValue.description: Maximum value for number inputs. Omitted when null.

MinimumValue.description: Minimum value for number inputs. Omitted when null.

StepValue.description: Step value for slider inputs. Omitted when null.

NumberType.description: Numeric type: 'Double' or 'Int32'. Omitted when null.

SelectedIndex.description: Selected item index for dropdown inputs. Omitted when null.

NodeOutputData.description: Metadata for a node designated as a graph output. Source: NodeOutputData.cs

InitialValue.description: The value of the output when the graph was saved.

PortModel.description: An input or output port on a node. Source: PortModel.cs

Description.description: Port tooltip. Maps to PortModel.ToolTip in source.

UsingDefaultValue.description: Whether the port is using its default value.

Level.description: List nesting level for list-at-level feature.

UseLevels.description: Whether list-at-level is enabled for this port.

KeepListStructure.description: Whether to preserve list structure during replication.

NodeModel.description: A node in the graph. Polymorphic — the ConcreteType field determines which additional properties are present. Source: NodeModel.cs, SerializationConverters.cs

ConcreteType.description: Assembly-qualified type name of the node class. Replaces JSON.NET $type via post-serialisation regex. Format: 'Namespace.ClassName, AssemblyName'.

NodeType.description: Semantic type category. Overridden by node subclasses.

Replication.description: Lacing strategy controlling how argument lists of different lengths are combined.

Description.description: Node description. Ignored on deserialization (re-derived from localization resources).

FunctionSignature.description: For FunctionNode types: mangled function name (DSFunction/DSVarArgFunction) or custom node definition GUID (Function).

Code.description: DesignScript source code. Only present on CodeBlockNodeModel nodes.

NumberType.description: Numeric type for slider/number input nodes.

MaximumValue.description: Maximum slider value. Present on slider input nodes.

MinimumValue.description: Minimum slider value. Present on slider input nodes.

StepValue.description: Slider step increment. Present on slider input nodes.

InputValue.description: Current value for input nodes. Type varies: number for sliders, boolean for BoolSelector, string for StringInput, object for ColorPalette ({R,G,B,A}).

WatchWidth.description: Custom display width for Watch nodes.

WatchHeight.description: Custom display height for Watch nodes.

SelectedIndex.description: Selected item index for dropdown nodes. -1 if nothing selected.

SelectedString.description: Serialized selection value for dropdown nodes.

Name.description: Node name override. Used by custom node (Function) instances.

Category.description: Category path. Used by custom node (Function) instances.

ConnectorModel.description: A wire connecting an output port to an input port. Source: ConnectorModel.cs, ConnectorConverter in SerializationConverters.cs

Start.description: GUID of the source output port.

End.description: GUID of the target input port.

IsHidden.description: Visibility flag. NOTE: serialized as a string ('True'/'False'), not a boolean.

NodeLibraryDependencyInfo.description: A package, file, or external dependency required by nodes in the graph. Source: NodeLibraryDependencyConverter in SerializationConverters.cs

Version.description: Package version (semver). Present for Package reference types.

Nodes.description: GUIDs of nodes that depend on this library.

ExtensionData.description: Data stored by a Dynamo extension/plugin. Source: ExtensionData.cs

LintingInfo.description: Active linter state. Source: LinterManagerConverter in SerializationConverters.cs

activeLinter.description: Name of the active linter, or 'None'.

BindingEntry.description: Trace/binding data for a single node. Used for element binding (e.g. Dynamo for Revit). Source: WorkspaceWriteConverter lines 948-989

Binding.description: Map of callsite IDs to serialized trace data strings.

ViewBlock.description: UI/view layer data. Added by WorkspaceViewWriteConverter during save. Source: DynamoCoreWpf/ViewModels/Core/Converters/SerializationConverters.cs

Dynamo.description: Dynamo application preferences snapshot at save time.

ConnectorPins.description: Pins placed on connectors for routing.

NodeViews.description: Per-node view state (position, visibility, input/output designation).

Annotations.description: Groups and notes. NoteModels are serialized as AnnotationModels with an empty Nodes array and optional PinnedNode.

DynamoViewInfo.description: Dynamo application state captured at save time. Serialized from DynamoPreferences.

HasRunWithoutCrash.description: Whether the graph has executed successfully at least once.

IsVisibleInDynamoLibrary.description: For custom nodes: whether this node appears in the library.

Version.description: Dynamo application version string at save time.

RunPeriod.description: Interval in milliseconds between automatic runs (as a string).

ConnectorPinInfo.description: A pin placed on a connector for visual routing. Source: ConnectorPinModel.cs

NodeViewInfo.description: Per-node view state (position, flags). Source: NodeViewModel.cs JSON properties

Id.description: GUID of the node this view info belongs to.

Name.description: Display name of the node as shown in the UI.

IsSetAsInput.description: Whether the node is designated as a graph input.

IsSetAsOutput.description: Whether the node is designated as a graph output.

Excluded.description: Whether the node is frozen/excluded from execution. Maps to IsFrozenExplicitly.

ShowGeometry.description: Whether to render this node's geometry in the 3D preview. Maps to IsVisible.

X.description: Node X position on the canvas.

Y.description: Node Y position on the canvas.

UserDescription.description: User-defined description/note for the node. Omitted from JSON when null.

AnnotationViewInfo.description: A group annotation or serialized note in the View block. Notes are stored as annotations with an empty Nodes array and optional PinnedNode. Source: AnnotationViewModelConverter in DynamoCoreWpf SerializationConverters.cs

Title.description: Group title text, or note text for serialized notes.

IsExpanded.description: Whether the group is expanded or collapsed.

Nodes.description: GUIDs (N format) of nodes belonging to this group. Empty for serialized notes.

HasNestedGroups.description: Whether this group contains other groups.

InitialTop.description: Initial top position before user adjustments.

TextblockHeight.description: Height of the title text block.

IsOptionalInPortsCollapsed.description: Whether optional input ports are collapsed for nodes in this group.

IsUnconnectedOutPortsCollapsed.description: Whether unconnected output ports are collapsed for nodes in this group.

HasToggledOptionalInPorts.description: Whether user has toggled optional input ports visibility.

HasToggledUnconnectedOutPorts.description: Whether user has toggled unconnected output ports visibility.

Background.description: Background color in ARGB hex format.

PinnedNode.description: GUID (N format) of a node this note is pinned to. Only present for serialized notes that are pinned.
